execution_scenarios.title: Termination Crash
execution_scenarios.description: Client demands immediate termination, but vendor insists on cure period.

execution_scenarios.title: Audit Crash
execution_scenarios.description: Regulator demands 24hr access, but contract requires 10 days notice.
